title: Add Blazor WebAssembly sample with core extended demos and GitHub Pages deployment
body: ### Blazor sample (`samples/SkiaSharpDemo.Blazor/`) - Shapes, Path Interpolation, BlurHash demos using `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` + project reference to `SkiaSharp.Extended` - Sidebar with EXTENDED group header and contextual icons matching MAUI sample grouping - `` in source for local dev; CI rewrites to `/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/` at publish time - `true` to ensure `libSkiaSharp` is linked into the WASM build ### CI (`builds-docs.yml`) - `wasm-tools` workload install, `dotnet publish` Blazor project, copy into `docs/_site/sample/` - Base href rewrite + `Get-ChildItem -Force` to copy all files including `.nojekyll` without conditional check - Deploy gated to `main` only; PRs build + upload artifact - Build target updated from `net9.0` to `net10.0` - Added `permissions` block for `contents: write` and `pages: write` ### Docs - "Try it live →" links added to `blurhash.md`, `geometry.md`, `path-interpolation.md` pointing to the Blazor sample - xref link fixes in `confetti.md`, `geometry.md`, `lottie.md` for proper API cross-references - "Sample" navigation entry added to `docs/toc.yml` ### TFM updates - Dropped `net9.0` targets from test projects (`SkiaSharp.Extended.Tests`, `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui.Tests`) — now `net10.0` only - Dropped `net9.0` targets from MAUI sample (`SkiaSharpDemo`) — now `net10.0` only ### Other - `copilot-setup-steps.yml` — added `wasm-tools` workload, updated to dotnet `10.0.x`, added branch filters - `azure-pipelines-steps-prepare.yml` — added `wasm-tools` workload install step - `copilot-instructions.md` — Blazor sample docs, PR screenshot requirement, `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` dependency - Solution file updated with Blazor project under `samples` folder ### Screenshots Home page: Shapes page: Path Interpolation page: BlurHash page:

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot i see an error in the screenshot, also, only 1 page where there are at least 3 samples. Please run the app and make sure there are no errors on any of the pages.

Fixed in 1e81444 and 09f1972. The errors were caused by the missing `<WasmBuildNative>true</WasmBuildNative>` property in the Blazor project — without it, `libSkiaSharp` wasn't linked into the WASM build, causing `DllNotFoundException` on every SkiaSharp call. Also added the missing `docs/` changes (Try it live links, xref fixes, Sample nav entry).

All 4 pages now load with zero console errors:

![Home](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ca085ba3-4289-4609-8aca-89ba095bf995)
![Shapes](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4ff5ff08-51e6-4ae4-842c-2583fe179feb)
![Interpolation](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e0d21dba-06d3-41ee-b1be-293840c4490d)
![BlurHash](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a04f6864-229a-4c32-b4da-8d337b9800ba)
